column1: Mickey Moniak headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, locked into the three-hole at home with a juicy platoon edge and a hitter-friendly park boosting his already sky-high 73% hit probability. Nico Hoerner isn’t far behind, setting the table atop the order with a steady righty bat and his own platoon advantage, making him a rock-solid option even in a road matchup. Jeremy Peña and Hunter Goodman both offer top-of-order roles in strong parks, giving streakers plenty of reliable bats to keep the momentum rolling. For those hunting upside, Joey Loperfido rounds out the list with a favorable lefty-on-righty look and a profile built for consistency.
